_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine if security improvement actions are evaluated, validated, and implemented as required
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Ability RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.496), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.494).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.366). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [actions, determine, evaluated, implemented, improvement, required] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.873, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 12-word NICE element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:12.4%, N:75.4%, C:12.2%). No dominant classification for "Determine if security improvement actions are evaluated, validated, and implemen" vs "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 > STS 0.366 (gap +0.165). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [actions, determine, evaluated, implemented, improvement, required]. WIDAI terms: [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes].
